input: Find 20 leads for a B2B SaaS company selling DevOps tools to mid-market companies (200-2000 employees) using Kubernetes, with engineering teams of 50+.
Our ICP is healthcare organizations with 500+ beds that haven't adopted cloud EHR yet. We need 10 qualified leads with budget authority contacts.
Score these 5 leads against our ICP and explain why each scored the way it did: Company A (50 employees, SaaS), Company B (500 employees, manufacturing), Company C (200 employees, fintech).
We've contacted 200 leads this quarter with a 3% conversion rate. Analyze which ICP dimensions predict conversion and suggest refinements.
Generate a lead list for an AI consulting firm targeting Series B+ startups in fintech that have recently hired a VP of Engineering or CTO.
